_comment: UBA attribute categories and their contained attributes. Shared attributes appear in multiple categories but store one value by name. Physical matrix attributes (Speed, Agility, Strength, Vertical) are calculated from height/weight; fixed attributes use caps.json.

slashing.label: Slashing
slashing._comment: Driving Layup and Driving Dunk shared with other categories. Speed With Ball shared with Playmaking.

playmaking.label: Playmaking
playmaking._comment: Speed With Ball is shared with Slashing. Its value is the same across both categories.

defense.label: Defense
defense._comment: Capped by Primary/Secondary/Weakness archetype unless an attribute has a fixed cap in caps.json. Pass Perception and Defensive Consistency are shared with Mental.

rebounding.label: Rebounding & Inside Finish
rebounding._comment: Close Shot and Standing Dunk shared with Post Scoring. Hands and Vertical are shared here for inside/rebounding context.

postScoring.label: Post Scoring
postScoring._comment: Close Shot and Standing Dunk shared with Rebounding. Only one value per shared attribute.

mental.label: Mental
mental._comment: League import mental attributes. These use fixed caps from caps.json, not archetype caps. Pass Perception and Defensive Consistency are shared with Defense; Hustle is shared with Physical.

physical.label: Physical
physical._comment: Speed, Agility, Strength, and Vertical are capped by height/weight, not archetype. Stamina, Hustle, and Hands use fixed caps from caps.json. Vertical is shared with Rebounding; Hustle is shared with Mental; Hands is shared with Rebounding.
